component.name: EpisodeItem
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("bg") m.thumb = m.top.findNode("thumb") m.epnum = m.top.findNode("epnum") m.title = m.top.findNode("title") m.airdate = m.top.findNode("airdate") m.desc = m.top.findNode("desc") m.badge = m.top.findNode("badge") m.badgeLabel = m.top.findNode("badgeLabel") m.statusKind = "" end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return m.title.text = c.title m.epnum.text = c.shortDescriptionLine2 m.airdate.text = c.shortDescriptionLine1 if c.description <> invalid then m.desc.text = c.description else m.desc.text = "" end if if c.HDPosterUrl <> invalid and c.HDPosterUrl <> "" then m.thumb.uri = c.HDPosterUrl end if
' DetailsView packs watched-state into releaseDate as ' "current:<text>" - up next / resume target (yellow badge) ' "watched" - finished (green check) ' "partial:<time>" - started but not finished (gray dot) marker = "" if c.releaseDate <> invalid then marker = c.releaseDate kind = marker text = "" colon = Instr(1, marker, ":") if colon > 0 then kind = Left(marker, colon - 1) text = Mid(marker, colon + 1) end if m.statusKind = kind if kind = "current" then m.badge.color = "0xffd24aff" m.badgeLabel.color = "0x141414ff" if text = "" then text = "Up next" m.badgeLabel.text = text m.badge.visible = true else if kind = "watched" then m.badge.color = "0x2ea043ff" m.badgeLabel.color = "0xffffffff" m.badgeLabel.text = "Watched" m.badge.visible = true else if kind = "partial" then m.badge.color = "0x4a4a4aff" m.badgeLabel.color = "0xffffffff" if text = "" then text = "In progress" m.badgeLabel.text = text m.badge.visible = true else m.badge.visible = false m.badgeLabel.text = "" end if applyRowColors(false) end sub sub onFocus() f = m.top.focusPercent applyRowColors(f >= 0.5) end sub sub applyRowColors(focused as Boolean) if focused then m.bg.color = "0x252525ff" m.title.color = "0xff2424ff" else if m.statusKind = "current" then ' Tint the background gold so the resume target stands out ' even when the user has scrolled focus elsewhere. m.bg.color = "0x2a2410ff" m.title.color = "0xffd24aff" else if m.statusKind = "watched" then m.bg.color = "0x101810ff" m.title.color = "0x9a9a9aff" else m.bg.color = "0x141414ff" m.title.color = "0xffffffff" end if end sub
